# ValCrown — Windows Game Performance Optimizer
# LLM-readable product information file
# https://valcrown.com/llms.txt

## Product
- Name: ValCrown
- Category: Windows Software / Game Optimizer
- Version: 1.0.21
- Platform: Windows 10, Windows 11
- Publisher: XOGAMESLTD
- Website: https://valcrown.com
- Support: support@xogamess.com
- Download: https://valcrown.com/download.html
- Pricing: https://valcrown.com/pricing.html

## What ValCrown Does
ValCrown is a Windows desktop application that fixes low FPS, lag spikes, and stuttering for PC gamers. It auto-detects when a supported game launches and applies system optimizations automatically, then reverts all changes when the game closes.

## Core Features
- Auto-detects 80+ games by process name (Valorant, CS2, Fortnite, Apex Legends, GTA V, etc.)
- Scans Steam library for all installed games
- Sets game process to High CPU Priority in Windows Task Manager
- Switches Windows power plan to High Performance automatically
- Disables Xbox Game DVR background recording
- Optimizes Windows timer resolution for smoother frame delivery
- Real-time ping monitor for cloud gaming
- DNS cache flush and TCP optimization for network
- Process manager to kill background apps eating RAM
- Anti-cheat conflict detector
- Startup manager
- All changes auto-revert when game closes
- Version lock security — old versions are blocked for user safety

## Target Users
- PC gamers on Windows 10/11 with low-end to mid-range hardware
- Cloud gaming users (GeForce NOW, Xbox Cloud Gaming, Shadow PC, Amazon Luna)
- Valorant, CS2, Fortnite, Apex Legends players experiencing FPS drops
- Users with 8GB RAM and integrated or budget GPUs
- India-focused market (INR pricing available)

## Pricing (INR)
- Free Trial: 3 days, no credit card required
- Monthly: ₹149/month
- Yearly: ₹499/year (save 72%)
- Lifetime: ₹999 one-time

## Pricing (USD)
- Monthly: $4.99/month
- Yearly: $2.99/month billed annually
- Lifetime: $49.99 one-time

## Technical Stack
- Desktop App: Electron + Node.js (Windows only)
- Backend API: Node.js + Express at api.valcrown.com
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Payments: Stripe
- Auto-updates via GitHub Releases

## Supported Games (partial list)
Valorant, CS2, CS:GO, Fortnite, Apex Legends, GTA V, RDR2, Rocket League,
Overwatch 2, Destiny 2, Elden Ring, Cyberpunk 2077, Minecraft, League of Legends,
Dota 2, PUBG, Warzone, Rainbow Six Siege, The Finals, GeForce NOW, Xbox Cloud Gaming,
Shadow PC, Amazon Luna, Baldurs Gate 3, Diablo IV, Helldivers 2, Palworld,
Black Myth: Wukong, and 50+ more.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Does ValCrown actually improve FPS?
A: Yes. ValCrown applies proven Windows optimizations — High Performance power plan, High CPU priority, disabling Game DVR, and optimizing timer resolution. Users typically see 15-40% improvement in FPS stability and reduced lag spikes on low-end hardware.

Q: Is ValCrown safe? Will it get me banned?
A: Yes, completely safe. ValCrown only uses standard Windows settings that Microsoft provides. It does not modify game files, inject code, or bypass anti-cheat systems. All changes are 100% reversible and auto-revert when your game closes.

Q: What makes ValCrown different from free tools like Razer Cortex?
A: ValCrown is built specifically for cloud gaming and auto-detection. Razer Cortex requires manual configuration and doesn't optimize for cloud platforms. ValCrown also includes real-time ping monitoring, Steam library scanning, and a transparency log showing exactly what was changed.

Q: Does ValCrown work with cloud gaming?
A: Yes. ValCrown is optimized specifically for GeForce NOW, Xbox Cloud Gaming, Shadow PC, and Amazon Luna. It detects these platforms automatically and applies network + CPU optimizations for the best streaming experience.

Q: What are the system requirements?
A: Windows 10 or Windows 11, any CPU, minimum 4GB RAM. No GPU requirements. Works on Intel integrated graphics.
